title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 37.455 - Ethanol-blended fuel, requirements for state vehicle fleet
text:
37.455.  Ethanol-blended fuel, requirements for state vehicle fleet. — The commissioner of administration shall ensure that no less than seventy percent of new purchases for the state vehicle fleet are flexible fuel vehicles that can operate on fuel blended with eighty-five percent ethanol.
(L. 2007 S.B. 54 § 1) 
Effective 1-01-08
